About: It is about a wind propelled water sport.

It is associated with hydrofoil fins.
It is associated with surf-freestyle, wave, freefly-slalom(racing) and big-air disciplines.

It consists of a wing that generates upward and horizontal force.
It consists of a board with a hydrofoil fin.

It was created around the summer of 2019 when inflatable wings were offered by manufacturers.

It is characterized by the direct control of the wing instead of using lines.

It is known for its use of inflatable wings.
It is known for its use in various deployment variants.
